---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for Colmena
title: "[feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the current friction?

## Proposal

How would you like Colmena to behave? Concrete behavior, CLI flags, or MCP tools welcome.

## Alternatives

Other approaches you considered and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, related issues, or anything else that helps frame the request.
